THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAYLOR, RUSSELL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1319 AND ONE HALF MINNA STREET, SAN FRANCISCO $3,278.66 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,278.66, STAYED UNTIL OCT-31-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, RENT AND DAMAGES OF $3,278.66 SHALL BE WAIVED IF DEFENDANT RUSSELL TAYLOR MOVES BY 10-31-94.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
